scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:functions: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter functions build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm --filter web dev
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter functions lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter functions typecheck && pnpm --filter @chainku/shared typecheck
scripts.emulators: pnpm run build:shared && firebase emulators:start --project demo-chainku
